field.label: Extract Directory (tmpfs)
field.help: Suricata extracted files directory. Use a tmpfs path for zero-disk I/O.

field.label: Max File Size (MB)
field.help: Files larger than this limit are skipped and deleted immediately.

field.label: Scan Queue Size
field.help: Bounded queue length. New files are dropped when full (fail-open).

field.label: Block Duration (seconds)
field.help: Temporary source block duration on malware detection.

field.label: PF Block Table
field.help: PF table name used for dynamic source blocking.

field.label: High-Risk Extensions
field.help: Comma separated extension list, e.g. exe,dll,elf,sh,bin.

field.label: Enable TLS Baseline Enforcement Hint
field.help: Only applies SNI/TLS fingerprint baseline policy in IDS; no MITM decryption.

field.label: Clamd LocalSocket
field.help: UNIX socket used by workers for local scan requests.
